title: oreogrammitis oncobasis
intro: Oreogrammitis oncobasis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The leaves of Oreogrammitis oncobasis are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often used to treat colds, flu, and other viral infections.
